item.title: ShaneRyanHere: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 10h Members of the Corrupt Golf Media are currently holding an emergency meeting to discuss
item.description: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 10h Members of the Corrupt Golf Media are currently holding an emergency meeting to discuss the question of amnesty in re: the LIVbots of Twitter. There is some support for a Lincoln-like pardon, with full posting privileges, provided they take a PGA Tour loyalty oath, while a Mostrar más 24 17 292 32 mil
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 2min En respuesta a @ShaneRyanHere y @JR_HIRSHey I know I’m not an official member but can I at least listen in on the meeting? 4 273

item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 10min "Behind the 16th green, I spoke with a man decked out in American flag-themed clo
item.description: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 10min "Behind the 16th green, I spoke with a man decked out in American flag-themed clothing from head to toe who recounted the Masters experience in 1960. Another older gentleman who was struggling to keep his footing down the 10th hole wasn’t quite sure the year of his first Masters, Mostrar más 1 1 11 2 mil
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 10min En respuesta a @fried_egg_golf Read the full piece from @JosephLaMagna here De thefriedegg.com 2 1 mil

NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 16min #DEVELOPING — In an X Space last night, well connected Ryan French ( @acaseofthegolf1 ) said that the LIV Golf League is set to shut down, with the possibility that this week’s event may not be played or could be the last. De Sledge 16 19 181 23 mil
